page_content:
BCHM675 Biophysical Chemistry (3 Credits)

Conformation, shape, structure, conformational changes, dynamics and interactions of biological macromolecules and complexes or arrays

of macromolecules. Physical techniques for studying properties of biological macromolecules.

Prerequisite: CHEM481 and BCHM461; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
